name: karpathy-loop
description: Autonomous Loop Engineering engine based on Andrej Karpathy's Autoresearch method. Enables AI agents to run iterative hypothesis-modify-execute-validate-improve cycles for continuous optimization of code, models, and metrics.

memory_caching.description: Uses Cache-Augmented Generation (CAG) to cache stable experiment context (program.md, metric definitions, baseline results) in KV memory, combined with prompt caching via OpenAI/Anthropic APIs to avoid recomputing shared system prompts across loop iterations. KV cache with Paged Attention reduces GPU memory fragmentation during batch experiment execution.

endpoints.name: /runLoop
endpoints.description: Start an autonomous loop that iteratively optimizes target code against a defined metric. Agent reads program.md, modifies target file, runs experiment, evaluates metric, and commits/reverts.

input.target_file: string (path to code file to optimize, e.g. train.py)
input.evaluation_script: string (path to prepare.py or eval harness)

endpoints.name: /getResults
endpoints.description: Retrieve current or historical results from a loop run, including iteration log, best metric, and improvement history.

endpoints.name: /runExperiment
endpoints.description: Execute a single isolated experiment iteration (dry-run or validation). Returns full metric output without commit/rollback.

endpoints.name: /getCacheStatus
endpoints.description: Inspect current cache state — active KV cache entries, prompt cache hits, memory usage per cache layer.

endpoints.name: /revertLast
endpoints.description: Revert the last accepted change in a loop run. Useful when a metric improvement is later found to be spurious.

testing_steps.name: Manifest Audit
testing_steps.expected: All permissions listed (gpu_access, llm_api_access, file_storage_read_write, network_access, git_operations) must be requested at init.

testing_steps.name: Baseline /runExperiment
testing_steps.description: Create a mock train.py that prints val_bpb: 1.50 after 2s sleep. Hit /runExperiment and verify metric extraction.

testing_steps.name: Autonomous /runLoop
testing_steps.description: Write a minimal program.md asking the agent to reduce val_bpb. Start /runLoop with max_iterations: 3. Verify agent modifies train.py, experiment runs, metric is evaluated, commit/rollback fires.

testing_steps.name: Cache Layer Test
testing_steps.description: Run /getCacheStatus before and after a loop. Verify prompt cache hits increase across iterations with identical system prefixes.

testing_steps.name: Results & Revert
testing_steps.description: Call /getResults during loop — ensure iterations increment and best_metric tracks. Then call /revertLast and verify git revert.
